note: This repository includes aggregate summaries and selected release metadata. Full per-case reports are kept outside the Git working tree because of their size and file count.

copied.RQ2: Retrieval-depth comparison summaries for balanced and alternative retrieval settings
copied.RQ3: Agent contribution summaries for direct single-pass generation, model-analysis ablation, requirement-analysis ablation, and dual-analysis ablation
copied.RQ4: Optimization ablation summaries for raw retrieval without digest and agent strategy guidance

external_artifacts.release_policy: Store large per-case result trees as release or archival assets rather than committing them to the main repository.
